title: LEGO NINJAGO Rogue's Mech Dragon Rider - Ninja Toy with Posable Dragon & Mech Figures - 4 Minifigures, incl. Lloyd & Arin plus a Reveal Sword - Gift for 8+ Year Old Boys & Dragons Rising Fans - 71843
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Ninja toy for kids – Rogue's Mech Dragon Rider adventure toy for 8+ year old boys and girls lets kids play out battle scenes from season 3 of the NINJAGO Dragons Rising TV show
LEGO mech and dragon toy – Kids can play with the posable mech and toy dragon figure separately or combine them to form Rogue's Mech Dragon Rider, the first-ever NINJAGO mech robot dragon

Posable figures – The LEGO NINJAGO mech features movable arms and legs, an opening chest for a minifigure and a sword, while the dragon toy includes posable wings, head, jaw, legs, tail and its own sword
4 NINJAGO minifigures – Includes Rogue, Arin, and the villainous duo Rox and a Spectral Dragonian Warrior, plus a banner with a secret message revealed only with Arin’s translucent blade accessory
NINJAGO gift idea for kids – This LEGO set offers a fun build-and-play experience and makes a great birthday gift for 8+ year old boys and girls who enjoy playing with ninja toys
Interchangeable NINJAGO mechs – Kids can also attach the mechs from Kai's Mech Storm Rider (71830) and Kai's Mech Rider EVO (71783) playsets (sold separately) to the back of this set's dragon figure
A universe of ninja toys – LEGO NINJAGO building sets let kids dive into a fantasy world of action-packed adventures alongside their ninja heroes
description: From the manufacturer Amazing ninja playtime LEGO NINJAGO dragon and mech playset Rogue’s Mech Dragon Rider combo ninja toy lets kids recreate all-action scenes from season 3 of the NINJAGO Dragons Rising TV show. Build, play and display Create a Mech Dragon Rider Ninja fans can play with the mech and the first-ever NINJAGO robot dragon before combining them to create Rogue’s Mech Dragon Rider. Previous page A battle-ready mech! Kids can open the mech’s chest and place a minifigure inside, before staging epic role-play battles. Posable Mech Dragon Rider The mech toy has movable arms and legs, while the dragon toy has movable wings, head, jaw, legs and tail, plus a sword. 4 NINJAGO minifigures LEGO building set comes with Rogue, Arin and the villainous duo of Rox and a Spectral Dragonian Warrior. Next page An exciting way to build Enter a digital world of building Let the LEGO Builder app guide you and your child on an intuitive building adventure. You can save sets, track progress and zoom in and rotate models in 3D as you build. Check out the full range More awesome LEGO NINJAGO playsets to collect Discover other NINJAGO sets (sold separately) and let kids play out even bigger ninja adventures. Previous page LEGO NINJAGO Ninja Combat Vehicle This LEGO NINJAGO 3-in-1 Ninja Combat Vehicle, featuring 2 bikes, 1 jet and 6 minifigures, lets kids enjoy endless hours of playtime with their heroes. LEGO NINJAGO Lloyd’s Jet Mech Ninja fans can stage thrilling action with this playset featuring a mech toy that can transform into a jet toy, a dragon toy and 5 minifigures. Next page
